message:
fix(telegram): accept integer chat_id and broaden schema type

Fix Telegram chat_id handling to accept both string and integer values,
matching the Telegram Bot API which accepts either format:

Schema change:
- chat_id type changed from "string" to ["string", "integer"] in
  send_message_input_schema(), allowing JSON Schema validation to pass
  for both string usernames ("@channel") and numeric chat IDs

Runtime handling (invoke_send_message):
- Replace simple .as_str() extraction with match on Value::String and
  Value::Number variants, converting integers to string for the API call
- Add explicit error messages for missing/wrong-type chat_id

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
